---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what is broken.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or attach a log excerpt from
`%APPDATA%/TokenLens/logs/` (Windows) or `~/.local/share/TokenLens/logs/`
(Linux/macOS).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- TokenLens version: [e.g. v0.1.0 — visible in the sidebar]
- Tauri / browser mode: [Tauri app | browser (vite dev)]
- Provider(s) involved: [e.g. openai / anthropic / local]
- Source mode: [passive | watcher | OpenCode plugin | manual import]

## Privacy

TokenLens stores only token counts and metadata by default. If your
report includes a raw event or log, please confirm you have scrubbed
any API keys, file paths, or personal data first.
